findings: Fall protection compliant at all active elevated work areas. Two workers on Level 3 missing high-visibility vests. Crane exclusion zone barricades missing flagging at two locations. Housekeeping needs improvement at Level 1 rebar staging area. Site traffic control at main entrance not following MUTCD standards.
corrective_actions: Issued replacement vests to workers cited. Added flagging to crane barricade perimeter. Cleaned rebar staging area. Corrected traffic control signage and cones at main entrance per MUTCD.

findings: Liebherr LTM 1750 annual inspection current. Manitowoc 18000 operator qualification verified. Concrete pumps - one delivery hose flagged as approaching replacement interval. All articulated trucks - daily inspection logs complete. Scissor lift boom lift fleet annual certifications all current.
corrective_actions: Replaced flagged concrete pump hose proactively. All other equipment compliant.

findings: Near miss incident investigation underway. Scaffold board dislodgement identified during inspection - gap in toe boarding on Levels 3-4 east concourse. Crane swing radius barricade has 4 gaps allowing pedestrian entry. Three subcontractor workers observed not wearing safety glasses in grinding area. Emergency eyewash station on Level 3 obstructed by materials.
corrective_actions: All scaffold toe boards verified and corrected project-wide within 4 hours. Crane barricade gaps closed and monitored by spotters during picks. Safety glasses violation citations issued to three workers and crew safety meeting held. Eyewash station area cleared.

findings: Tower cranes TC-1 and TC-2 weekly inspection complete all components satisfactory. Boom lift JLG-3 due for monthly inspection - completed on site. Concrete pump hoses on stationary unit all replaced following February 19 incident. Forklift fleet 4 units - all daily pre-shift logs verified. Scaffolding system BrandSafway - re-inspection complete following January 22 near miss all areas compliant.
corrective_actions: Monthly inspection completed on JLG-3 and sticker updated. All equipment compliant following corrective actions.

findings: Significant improvement from prior inspection. Fall protection 100% compliant all elevated areas. Crane exclusion zones all properly barricaded and spotted. Housekeeping substantially improved. Three areas needing attention: portable fire extinguisher in Level 5 suite corridor expired tag; hard hat not worn by one visitor during site tour; concrete truck washout area overflowing.
corrective_actions: Replaced expired fire extinguisher. Visitor hard hat policy reinforced with site office staff and sign-in procedures updated. Concrete washout area pumped and capacity doubled with second container.
